Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-26-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONERS Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award Regarding Petitioners' Fifth Request For Reimbursement From The Scottsdale Fund And Judgment Thereon:
APPEAR: Jon-Marc Dobrin, Esq. & Hal Chase Jr., Esq. 459-0307 for petitioners & moving parties; A. Raymond Hamrick, III, Esq. 818/763-5292 for respondents & opposing parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling (MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD GRANTED). Prevailing party to prepare order. In addition, parties to submit proposed orders re allocation issues & interest issues and set hearing date & briefing schedule. (302/AJR/AA) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193

Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-13-2002 Continued To Nov-26-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

APPEAR: Jon-Marc Dobrin, Esq. 459-0307 for petitioners & moving parties; no other appearances.

MOTION Notice Of Petition For Order; (1) To Determine Arbitrator'S Jurisdiction To Issue Award After Arbitration; And (2) That United National And Generali Have No Right To Prevent Petitioners Form Obtaining
Off Calendar Feb-08-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Jon-Marc Dobrin, Esq. & Hal Chase, Jr., Esq. 459-0307 for petitioners & moving parties; A. Raymond Hamrick, III, Esq. & Lisa A. Gallo, Esq. 818/763-5292 for respondents & opposing parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling re petition to determine arbitrator's jurisdiction without prejudice to rights of other parties; and adopted re request for declaratory relief. Petitioner to prepare order.
